warm_up: Review top error from last session: vocabulary.
focus: Grammatical gender of common café and food nouns (der Gugelhupf, die Melange, der Kleine Braune) with a focus on accusative article agreement (ein/eine/einen) — practice by drilling 'Ich möchte einen/eine/ein …' with a set of masculine, feminine, and neuter food and drink items.
speaking_prompt: You walk into a scene with Georg (Friendly Viennese local). Scenario: local smalltalk. Speak naturally.
